title: Translating Natural Language Descriptions to Formal Query Conditions
scenario: Translate natural language descriptions of user queries into formal query conditions for a database. The descriptions may include vague terms, synonyms, and ambiguous language. The target LLM output should demonstrate an understanding of formal query languages and the ability to parse natural language descriptions to generate accurate query conditions.
constraints: Must use formal query language syntax
Must parse vague terms and synonyms correctly

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output uses formal query language syntax.
Check if the output correctly parses vague terms and synonyms.
Check if the output generates accurate query conditions.
